111.content: It's every guy's fantasy: hot naked cheerleaders! But how do these hot cheerleaders end up naked?
111.title: The cheerleaders

choices: The "uniform" was only a single swim cap
The "uniform" was just a loincloth-like slip
112.content:
The Blackridge High swim team was one of the best teams in the state. Well, officially, second best, after losing the State Championship to Franklin D Roosevelt High last year. This year was different, though. They were going to train even harder, and do whatever it takes to win, especially since some of their best swimmers had graduated.

As dedicated as the team was to winning, Coach Phil was even moreso. Ever since that devastating loss, Coach Phil had spent nearly every day (and quite a few nights) researching how to maximise the team's potential. After months of careful research, he came to an interesting conclusion: the team's traditional uniforms were slowing them down.

It was the first practice of the new season and both the boys and girls of the swim team were gathered in one of the classrooms near the pool, as is usual for the first practice since that is where Coach Phil announces his plans for the upcoming season and announces the team captains.

Everyone was buzzing; the sophomores through seniors were thirsty for revenge on their rivals, while the freshmen were just excited to have made it onto one of the most successful swim programs in the state. And when Coach Phil had emailed them over the summer hinting at "new uniforms", that only got everyone even more excited.

Once everyone settled down, Coach Phil began his announcement of his plan to win state this year: practicing before and after school, utilizing the weight room, and more intense conditioning. Everyone groaned at the additional practices, but understood them to be necessary. Finally, it was time to announce the new uniforms

"And of course, your new uniforms, which will significantly reduce drag and allow much faster movement through the water." Coach Phil announced.

Everyone began whispering excitedly to each other, until finally Sabrina, a blonde junior raised a question.

"Can we see them?"

"Not yet, I want it to be a surprise. Besides, I still have to name the team captains." Coach Phil pointed out. Sabrina nodded her head, but was disappointed. She hated surprises.

"Alright, after careful consideration, I have decided on your new team captains. Please give a loud round of applause to... Abigail Grace and Thomas Garnett!"

The room erupted in applause, although everyone pretty much saw it coming. Always one boy and one girl, the team captains were almost always seniors, and Abby and Thomas were seniors with great talent, and more importantly, leadership ability. Coach Phil had no doubt that Abby and Thomas would help lead their team to victory against FDR High this year, and perhaps even beyond.

"Alright, enough chat, let's get swimming! I want everyone showered and in the pool area in no more than ten minutes from now!" Coach Phil exclaimed, ending the preseason pep talk.

"But we don't have our uniforms yet!" one of the sophomores pointed out.

"Oh, yes, right." the coach mumbled. "I think I left them in my office. Go head and get to the locker rooms, I'll have Abby and Tom pass them out."

Many swimmers sighed, annoyed that their coach was prolonging the suspense even further. But that was typical of him, since he has a funny sense of humour. With the exception of Abby and Tom, the team made their way to their appropriate locker rooms, eager to receive their uniform so they could finally see what the big fuss is, as well as begin practicing.

Abby and Tom followed Coach Phil to his office, where there were two boxes sitting on his desk.

"Alright my new captains, these boxes are full of brand new uniforms. Go head and each grab one and take them to the locker room to pass out." Coach Phil instructed.

"Uh, coach, which one is the for the boy's team and which one is for the girls'?" Tom asked, curious since both boxes appeared identical. Traditional swimming uniforms were pretty different depending on sex, due to obvious differences in anatomy.

"Doesn't matter, they're all the same." Coach Phil shrugged.

Abby and Tom looked at each other in confusion, and slight suspicion, but did as they were told anyway. The boxes were lighter than either of them suspected, but they both shrugged it off. It's not like they had heavy pads or helmets like some of the other sports.

The two chatted as they walked down the hallway until they reached the locker rooms, which were connected to the pool area. Abby entered the girl's locker room with a box of uniforms, and was greeted by cheers from girls of various states of undress. All of them had showered, but some had opted to cover their modesty with a towel, while others were unabashedly naked in front of their teammates. After all, it was just girls in the room, and they had all seen each other naked at some point or another. Either way, everyone was excited to finally receive their uniform.

Abby opened the box, which contained smaller boxes, each to be given to a member of the team. Abby passed out the small boxes, and the girls eagerly opened them, anxious to finally put the suspense to rest and put on their brand-spanking-new uniforms.

However, that excitement quickly changed to confusion when...
112.title: The swim team

1121.content:
Everyone looked at their "uniform" in confusion.

"Where's the rest of it?" one senior girl named Ashley questioned. Though she was friends with Abby, the two always had a bit of a rivalry, and Ashley was a bit jealous that Coach Phil picked Abby over her.

"I... think this is it. Coach told me and Thomas that both ours and the boys' uniforms were the exact same." Abby said, in slight shock at what she was seeing. "That's the only way this would make sense."

"Abby... are you seriously saying that Coach wants us to swim naked?" Ashley asked her new captain.

"Unfortunately, yes." Abby answered regretfully. "He did say that this would be the most 'minimalistic' and 'drag reducing' uniform ever, and this seems to fit the bill alright.

The team argued amongst themselves, with some agreeing with Ashley in that this "uniform" must be a mistake, while others agreeing with Abby. Either way, most of the girls were NOT happy with what they were given. Except for Lily, a junior who was known for being a bit 'open' with her body, not caring much about modesty around the locker room.

"I don't see what the big deal is, honestly. So what if we're naked? We'll definitely swim faster, and getting changed will be such a breeze!" Lily said with a shrug. Lily was also known to be of a 'coach's pet', since she always went with whatever the coach said. Being the fastest junior girl, she really wanted to ensure that she became team captain next year.

"Not everyone likes to show off like you do, Lily." Ashley replied sternly. "But go ahead and go to practice naked, I guess. We won't stop you."

"Fine, I will. We're almost late anyway. Don't be surprised when Coach gets pissed that I'm the only one in uniform though." Lily said with a humph, putting on her swim cap. Without a hint of shame, she walked out of the locker room and into the pool area completely naked except for the cap, her boobs slightly jiggling with each step. The rest of the team watched in awe. She knew that she was about to be seen naked by the boys team and Coach Phil, right?

"She's right." Abby admitted. "We shouldn't be late for our first practice. Let's just suck it up and head on out. Maybe if Coach sees how ridiculous this is, we'll get our real uniforms back."

"Suit yourself, captain, but I will most certainly NOT be practicing naked!" Ashley retorted, to the agreement of most of the team.

"Fine! But it's no wonder that Coach picked me to be captain over you; you never listen!" Abby shot back. There were a few gasps at what Abby said. Like Lily, she donned the swim cap, which was her entire uniform, and walked out of the locker room completely naked. She was followed by a couple freshman girls, who although were incredibly embarrassed to be naked outside of the locker room, wanted to get on the captain's good side.

Abby and the two other girls entered the pool area, and braced themselves as they were about to be seen butt naked by boys and their coach. Before walking in, the nude girls covered up their modesty with their arms, even though they knew that they couldn't hide their goods forever.

Upon walking in, they saw the Coach talking to the boys' team and Lily, and their mouths dropped when they noticed that...
1121.title: The "uniform" was only a single swim cap

124.content:
Blackridge High also boasts a few charity clubs as well. Some of these clubs are willing to go the extra mile in order to bring in money or raise awareness for their causes. Any publicity is good publicity, right?

Which club will we be following today?
124.title: A charity club

choices: Stacey, the unashamed and outgoing club president
1241.content:
Student Against Breast Cancer is a club that raises money to bring awareness to breast cancer, one of the most common forms of cancer. The club is made up of both boys and girls, many of whom have had a loved one diagnosed with breast cancer, making this a personal issue for most of them. They are lead by Stacey Cosgrove, an extroverted and bubbly blonde senior girl who is tired of the same old fundraisers and publicity stunts the club has used in the past to bring attention to such a horrible disease.

It all began on the last Friday before October, which is of course Breast Cancer Awareness Month. Club meetings were typically held Fridays after school in one of the classrooms. Obviously, this is the most important time of the year for the club, as that is when they receive the majority of their donations. However, the past few years have shown a clear decline in donations and pledges. Last year, the club barely made enough money to cover their expenses, and if they didn't come up with some way to increase revenue, they'll end up losing money! Not a good look for a charity club, that's for sure.

Members of the club were talking with each other before the meeting began, some just chatting casually, while others were speculating on what Stacey has decided for Breast Cancer Awareness Month. But nobody could have anticipated what was about to happen next.

At exactly 3:30, Stacey Cosgrove, the esteemed club president, walked into the classroom with all of her peers... completely topless. Below her waist, she was wearing a nice pair of jeans and boots, but above the waist... absolutely nothing!

All chatter immediately ceased, replaced by gasps and some giggling. Stacey walked to the podium positioned front center of the room with her hands at her sides, seemingly uncaring that all her peers were staring at her perky B cup boobs topped with light pink nipples, bouncing ever so slightly with each step. Once she reached the podium, she began her announcement.

"Hey guys!" Stacy greeted the club in her typical bubbly demeanor, with her tits on full display. "I'm sure you're all wondering why I'm standing completely topless in front of you."

"Well, it's simple. Breast cancer is one of the most prevalent forms of cancer, and the most prevalent cancer in women. More than 1 in 10 women will be diagnosed with breast cancer in their lifetime. So I thought, what better way to bring awareness to breast cancer, than to show our breasts?"

This caused everyone to gasp and whisper amongst themselves. What did she mean, 'our'?

"We lost a lot of money last year buying merchandise to resell to our classmates, so I decided to do away with expenses and come up with a brand new way to make money: for the first week in October, everyone in this club, boy and girl, will spend that week completely topless, as I am right now. If we receive at least $1000 in donations that week, then we will spend the rest of the month topless. If we make more than $5000 in October, then we will finish the rest of the semester totally topless!" Stacey announced with a wide grin.

Everyone's jaw hit the floor. The guys then began cheering loudly. Of course they loved the idea, who cares if they went topless? But nearly every girl was totally shocked. Stacey really wanted them to show their boobs for an entire week... at minimum?

Finally Rachel Johnson, the club treasurer, spoke up.

"Stacey, we love you and all... but this is downright insane! You didn't even think to consult the rest of us about this?" Rachel questioned. "Did you think about the fact that not everyone wants their tits on display for the whole school?"

"Of course I thought about it, Rachel." Stacey answered. "I know not everyone is as comfortable as I am about their body. But breast cancer is an inherently uncomfortable topic. We need to normalise it in whatever way we can, so that no girl, or guy for that matter, is ashamed to talk about it. So many women go undiagnosed because of the embarrassment. If we can get past that initial embarrassment, we'll make a huge breakthrough in getting girls to be unashamed about getting themselves checked out. And besides, think of it this way: most people will share a class with someone in this club. This will make it impossible to ignore the realities of breast cancer, since you're faced with a reminder every day. Trust me, I've thought about this a lot, and I think this will be our most successful, and groundbreaking campaign yet."

Everyone couldn't help but agree. Even the girls, whose boobs would be on constant display for at least a week, knew that Stacey was right.

"Now, does anyone else have any objections?" Stacey asked.

If anyone did, they were too afraid to voice them.

"Great, so on Monday, I expect to see everyone in this room with their tits out. I promise, it'll be worth it, and hey, some of you might even like it. I know I will." Stacey said, with a wink. "I want full participation; if you come to school wearing anything above your waist, I'll take that as your resignation from the club."

Stacey spent the rest of the club meeting explaining how they will be collecting donations, which will primarily be collected by each member individually. To make it even more interesting, the member with the most individual donations will receive a special prize!

Finally, it was time for the meeting to end, and soon every girl in the club went home knowing that on Monday everyone in school will know what their boobs look like.



Now, whose story should we follow first?
1241.title: Students Against Breast Cancer

12412.content:
Lucy Adams was a shy redhead and a sophomore at Blackridge High. When she heard the announcement that she, along with everyone else in the club, had to show up to school topless on Monday, she nearly fainted. Nobody had seen her in anything less than a one piece since she was a child, and now she was expected to show her boobies to everyone she knows in the name of breast cancer awareness.

Though she turned driving age a few weeks ago, she didn't have her license yet, and had to be picked up after the meeting by her mom. Luckily, she wasn't alone, as her friend Susie usually accompanied her, living close enough for both their moms to agree taking turns driving the two home. Susie was a lot more extroverted than Lucy, despite being a couple months younger, and she was actually looking forward to Monday!

"Wow, I can't believe it. Topless! In front of everyone!" Susie said with a giggle as they walked toward the car.

"You sure don't seem to mind. You really don't care that everyone will see your boobs? Even the boys?" Lucy questioned her friend. She knew Susie was outgoing, but this surprised her.

"Nope!" Susie replied with a grin. "I think Stacey is right. This is definitely what the club needed to bring those donations in."

"I just... I don't know. I don't think I can do it." Lucy said with a sigh. "I don't exactly feel like having everyone know what my tits look like, y'know?"

"Oh c'mon Lucy, it'll be fun! They're just boobs, everyone's got em. I wish I had some as nice as yours, too."

Lucy didn't respond, but looked down at her sizable chest. It was true, she had some nice boobs. They were easily a C cup, almost a D, and teardrop shaped, meaning they were pretty perky with only a slight droop.

A minute later they reached the front of the school, where Lucy's mom was patiently waiting. She waved the girls over, and opened the automatic doors on the minivan to let them in.

"Hey girls, how was the meeting?" she asked, chirpily.

"Good." Lucy replied quickly. She really didn't want her mom to find out about the big news.

"So, what's the big event for Breast Cancer Awareness Month?" she pressed. Lucy regretted sharing that info with her mom. But before she could change the subject, Susie jumped in, knowing that Lucy would try to avoid telling her mom.

"We're going topless for a week! To remind everyone what we're fighting for!" she answered happily. Lucy groaned inwardly. There was no stopping it now.

"Topless? Like no shirt or blouse or anything, just a bra?" her mom asked curiously. Lucy's face was pretty red now, because she knew Susie would just keep going.

"No bra, either!"

"Oh my goodness!" Lucy's mom exclaimed. "Lucy, is this true?"

Lucy wanted to lie and say that her friend was making it all up, but she knew she couldn't keep up. So she just nodded and said "yeah".



How does her mother respond?
12412.title: Lucy, a shy redheaded sophomore

124121.content:
"That's... amazing!" Lucy's mom replied. Lucy was now beet red by this point. Her own mother just said that the idea of her daughter going to school with her boobs totally on display was amazing.

"I know, right? I can't wait!" Susie said. "I almost want to start right now!"

"Hey, I won't stop you!" Lucy's mom laughed. Susie took that as permission to get topless in the car, as she whipped off her shirt and unfastened her bra, unleashing her A cup boobs. Though small, they were still substantial and suited her small frame pretty well. Lucy couldn't turn any redder if she tried. Her best friend just got topless in her car in front of her mom!

"Alright Lucy, your turn!" Susie giggled.

Never mind, Lucy somehow turned redder. Lucy decided to ignore her friend and hope the conversation turned somewhere unrelated to toplessness.

"Now Lucy, don't leave your friend hanging." her mom chastised her.

"Yeah, don't leave me hanging!" Susie repeated, though giving 'hanging' a double meaning by gesturing to her boobs.

"I... are you serious?" Lucy stammered.

"I mean, you're going to be topless all next week, aren't you?" her mom asked. "Might as well get a head start so you get comfortable."

"Mom, I don't think I can do it. I think I'd rather drop the club."

"Nonsense! You know breast cancer is a subject near and dear to our family. What do you think your Aunt Carol would say about you dropping the club over something stupid?"

Lucy tried arguing back, but she couldn't. It was true, breast cancer was important to her ever since her Aunt Carol died of it a couple years ago. She was very close to Lucy, and was the main reason Lucy joined the club in the first place.

"It's just... I don't want everyone to see my boobs!" she exclaimed.

"C'mon Lucy, with a rack like yours, you'd easily collect the most donations. We need you!" Lucy encouraged her.

"She's right, Lucy. You need to let loose a little! You're lucky you live in a time and place that allows this level of expression. I so wish we had something like this when I was your age." her mom added.


The two kept pressuring and encouraging Lucy to get naked from the waist up. Lucy didn't know what to do.
124121.title: She loves the idea

1241211.content:
"Fine! You guys win!" Lucy exclaimed in defeat.

After minutes of her mom and Susie begging her to take off her top, Lucy decided to just give in, hoping by doing so they'd drop the subject quicker.

Taking a deep breath, Lucy unbuttoned her blouse, to the cheers of Susie and her mom. After taking off the garment, she was left sitting in just her black bra, putting quite a bit of cleavage on display.

"The bra too, sweetie." her mom said, almost as if ordering her to do so.

Not wanting to prolong all this attention on her, Lucy obliged and unfastened her bra, exposing her impressive chest to the two other occupants of the car. Susie whistled in appreciation. "Ha ha, try and stop me with your hands glued to your tits like that." Susie taunted. Lucy did nothing but glare as Susie started putting her clothes in her backpack! Her mom didn't help either, simply laughing to herself at the girls' antics in the backseat.

Five minutes later, Lucy's mom pulled into Susie's driveway.
1241211.title: She gets topless

choices: Lucy gets caught by one of her siblings
Lucy makes it to her room unseen
12412111.content:
Susie said goodbye and thanked Lucy's mom for the ride, then opened the door. She didn't get dressed, as apparently at some point she had put her own clothes in the backpack as well, and left the mini van still topless.

"Wow, she really is confident." Lucy admitted to herself, before remembering that Susie still had her blouse and bra!

"Wait, Susie!!" she cried out, but Susie either didn't hear her or ignored her as she entered her house, topless of course.

Her mom started backing out, seemingly unconcerned that her daughter's friend just left her daughter stranded topless in the mini van.

"Well, are you gonna get out and get them back or what?"

Lucy thought about it, but decided she'd rather not knock on her friend's door in nothing but a pair of jeans.

"No... I guess not."

"Alright, well I'm gonna keep going."

And with that, Lucy's mom backed out of her friend's driveway and began driving home, leaving Lucy completely topless in the backseat without any way to cover herself besides her hands. After her mom parked the car, Lucy braced herself as she exited the van and followed her mom into her house, hoping her siblings were in their rooms, or otherwise not in the living room or kitchen, which she would have to make her way through before reaching her room.

124121111.content:
"Lucy, remember it's your turn to take out the trash tonight. I expect this done bef-"

Lucy ignored the rest of her mom's order as she made a beeline to her room, her hands glued to her chest for both modesty and support. Of course, being on the second floor, this made it harder for her to make it there unseen.

By a stroke of luck, though, Lucy managed to reach her room without running into any of her siblings. Sighing with relief, Lucy turned the knob to her door, eager to be fully dressed again after being completely topless.

But the knob wouldn't budge!

Lucy rolled her eyes and groaned. This had happened many times before, with one of her siblings locking her out of her own room as a prank. After the last time it happened, Lucy swore she hid the key somewhere only she could find it, but evidently she did not, as she was once again locked out of her room. "Looking for this?" a singsong voice came from behind the topless redhead, jiggling key on a lanyard keychain. Lucy grimaced as she turned around to see...
124121111.title: Lucy gets caught by one of her siblings

1241211111.content:
Lucy cursed under her breath. Jamie was two years older than Lucy, a recent graduate of Blackridge High and a current student at the local college. The small gap in age meant that the two sisters had long been very close, but recently Jamie had grown quite jealous of Lucy, or more specifically, her breasts. Despite being older, Jamie was less gifted in the "boob department", only managing to fill the smallest B cup bras. When Lucy started her growth spurt, Lucy could tell based on her sister's stares that she was jealous of her rack, but she never mentioned it.

Still, Jamie's jealousy of her sister's near D cups continued to grow. And there they were, right in front of her, covered only by two small hands.

"Not so fast, sis. You've got some explaining to do." Jamie replied, continuing to twirl the key.

"It's... a long story."

"I've got time."

"Fine, let me get dressed first and I'll tell you." Lucy offered, her hands still glued to her mammaries. She often bickered like this with Jamie, like any siblings would, but it was especially annoying to do so while topless and locked out from her clothes.

"Nope, I know you'll just go in, get dressed, and I'll never hear it. I just wanna know why my innocent little sister just came home from school with her boobs out." Jamie said with a shrug. "It's either that, or you'll have to take it from me. Your call, sis."

Lucy sighed. She didn't really want to play her sister's games, especially in this state of undress. But without her room key, that couldn't really happen. She considered her options.

Option 1) She could tell her sister why she was topless, and hope that Jamie holds up her end of the deal. Of course, there's no guarantee that she would. Plus, she didn't exactly like the idea of her sister knowing that she'll have to be topless in school next week.

Option 2) She could simply try and grab the key from Jamie. After all, she was twirling it right in front of her. But that would mean freeing one hand from her tits, which also meant potential exposure.

Option 3) Tattle to her mom, and hope that her mom resolves it.
1241211111.title: Her older sister, Jamie

12412111111.content:

13.content:
Blackridge High boasts a long standing mascot tradition not commonly seen at the high school level. Not just anyone gets to be the mascot, as there are long, extensive tryouts that one must pass, which require feats of agility, stamina, and endurance. Sometimes there's just one mascot, sometimes there's multiple.

Whoever it is, though, is bound to show off more than they anticipated in the name of school spirit. Who will it be?

Kara, a redheaded sophomore who is rather shy off field, but eager to prove herself as a mascot

Lindsay, an outgoing blonde junior who just wants to keep the audience pumped up.

David and Rachel, two seniors whose recent poor performances are jeopardizing their positions as mascots, putting their scholarships at risk. As a result, they'll do anything to keep their positions and scholarships
13.title: The mascot

14.content:
One brave girl will end up exposed in front of her classmates for the glory of Blackridge High. With no teammates or friends to share the embarrassment, all eyes will be on her. Who will it be?

Kylie - A blonde sophomore determined to make her school pride known by wearing something revealing for Spirit Day

Mandy - A busty sophomore who must follow through on a rather embarrassing bet...

Hannah - A pale black haired beauty who ends up exposed at a pep rally, against her wishes

Taylor - A senior Latina who wants to do something crazy before she graduates
14.title: One single girl

141.content:
"Dani, sweetie, are you sure you still want to do this?" Dani's mom asked with slight concern as she pulled up to the school's entrance.

"Yes, mom, I'm sure." Dani replied, though her shaking voice contradicted her statement. "Besides, we're already here, too late to go back now."

"We can go home so you can change if you want, and I'll call the school to let them know you'll be a little late."

"Mom, it's fine. Really!"

It was Spirit Week at Blackridge High, perhaps the most important time of the semester, barring exam days. And why wouldn't it be? Blackridge boasts one of the most competitive athletic programs in the entire state, while also managing to put out impressive test scores across the student body. The students and staff at Blackridge have a lot to be proud of, and what better way to show off that pride than on Spirit Week?

During Spirit Week, the school's dress code is relaxed in order to accommodate costumes, masks, face paint, or anything a student would want to wear in order to show off their school spirit. Athletes also tend to wear their uniforms too, in order to promote their teams. After lunch, all afternoon classes are cancelled in favor of various events, as well as competitions that pit the four different grade levels against each other. Today, on Monday, the afternoon event is a pep rally, followed by a costume contest in which one member of each grade is nominated for having the best costume.

And Dani was determined to win that contest. Though it has only been a month since Dani started her first year at Blackridge High, she was disappointed that she hadn't made many friends yet, and desperately wanted attention and respect from her fellow classmates. So she decided to accomplish that by showing that she had the most school spirit out of anyone. She knew she had to top everyone else's costume, and spent all last week thinking of just how to do that. Yesterday, she made her decision.

"Ok dear, have a good day. You be sure to call me if you need me to pick you up or anything." Dani's mom reminded her daughter. Although she wasn't exactly a fan of Dani's attire, she promised to support her daughter's choices so long as they don't get her into any legal trouble or lead to physical harm.

"Sure mom, ok." Dani agreed, opening the passenger side door of her mom's SUV. "Well, thanks for the ride. Love you, bye!"

Although she was nervous, Dani stepped out of her mother's car and onto the walkway leading to the school's entrance. Immediately everyone stopped in their tracks as they noticed that the cute blonde freshman was...
141.title: Dani

1412.content:
...butt naked. This was Dani's grand idea to win the contest: total nudity. So after her morning shower, she simply didn't put on a single article of clothing. Not even shoes.

Her blonde hair was even tied in a ponytail so that her perky 32B cup boobs topped with small pink nipples were completely exposed. Below her waist, her totally shaved pussy and her bare ass were in full view of everyone.
